source_title: Escola de Dados — Primeiros passos no jornalismo de dados
author: Escola de Dados

extracts.extract: Numbers alone are not relevant — you need to answer 'so what?': what do these numbers affect, who do they affect, and how?
extracts.relevance_rationale: The so-what test for numbers is fundamental editorial judgment that no LLM replaces

extracts.extract: It is fundamental to read the notes on data-recording methodologies. The date a piece of data was recorded may differ from the date the recorded event actually occurred.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Reading metadata and data-recording methodology notes remains essential for data quality verification
